message:
🐛 Use Netlify.env.get() for GITHUB_TOKEN in nightly E2E function

Netlify Functions v2 uses the Netlify global object for env vars,
not process.env. This was causing GITHUB_TOKEN to be undefined.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
